pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against JDK 17, failing to utilize JDK 21 features or enforce JDK 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Kotlin compiler version to 2.0.0 to support JDK 21 and new language features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Kotlin versions may not fully support JDK 21 bytecode or APIs, potentially causing compilation errors or runtime issues on the new JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot to version 3.3.1 to ensure compatibility with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.2.0 might have compatibility issues or missing support for JDK 21 specific features or security requirements.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to 3.13.0 to ensure proper compilation support for JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugins may not correctly handle JDK 21 class files or module system features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to 3.3.0 to ensure test execution compatibility with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Surefire versions may fail to launch or execute tests correctly on JDK 21 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade jib-maven-plugin to 3.4.3 to support building images with JDK 21 base images.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Jib versions may not recognize or properly configure JDK 21 base images.
